searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Search term for ads (e.g., company name, keyword)

country.title: Country
country.description: Country code for ad targeting (e.g., US, IT, GB)

maxAds.title: Maximum Ads
maxAds.description: Maximum number of ads to scrape

includeInactive.title: Include Inactive Ads
includeInactive.description: Include ads that are no longer active

scrapeDetails.title: Scrape Detailed Information
scrapeDetails.description: Extract detailed ad information (slower but more comprehensive)

delayBetweenRequests.title: Delay Between Requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequests.description: Delay between requests to avoid rate limiting

pageId.title: Page ID (Optional)
pageId.description: Specific Facebook Page ID to search ads for

enableGraphQLInterception.title: Enable GraphQL Interception
enableGraphQLInterception.description: Intercept GraphQL requests for more comprehensive data (2025 feature)

headlessMode.title: Headless Mode
headlessMode.description: Run browser in headless mode (faster but may be detected)

accessToken.title: Meta Graph API access token (optional)
accessToken.description: If provided AND adType is a regulated category (political, housing, employment, credit), the Actor calls the official Ad Library API instead of scraping. Leave empty to always use the browser path.

apiVersion.title: Graph API version
apiVersion.description: Meta Graph API version used by the official-API path.

extraApiParams.title: Extra Graph API params
extraApiParams.description: Forwarded verbatim to the ads_archive endpoint. Use this to pass new Meta fields (e.g. additional target_* filters) without a code change.

shard.title: Shard { index, total }
shard.description: Run N Actors in parallel over disjoint ad-ID space. Example: {"index":0,"total":4} in Actor 1, {"index":1,"total":4} in Actor 2, etc. Leave empty for single-Actor runs.

rawCacheMaxBytes.title: Raw-payload cache max bytes
rawCacheMaxBytes.description: Upper bound on storage/raw/ (gzipped GraphQL bodies). LRU-evicts oldest first. Default 500 MB.
